behavior_summary: Provides the 'U8P_STALAG::look' (examine) response for a stalagmite/stalactite object so the player sees a short description like "stalactite ".

Handles hits against the stalag object: decides behavior based on the item's current frame (intact vs already-broken), who hit it (player/avatar vs NPC), and a hitCode parameter. Player-caused breaks freeze the avatar (stasis), play a breaking sound, run a multi-frame break animation that spawns debris effects, then destroy the object. NPC hits play a different sound and run a shorter animation before destroying the object.
Uses engine/item APIs (Item::getFrame, Item::isNpc, Item::receiveHit, Item::setType, Item::setFrame, spawn FREE::1C19, Item::destroy) to mutate state, animate, and clean up.
notable_control_flow: Event 0 (U8P_STALAG::look): U8P_STALAG::STALAG::look prepares and forwards the literal description string to Item::bark and returns that result.

Hit handling (U8P_STALAG::STALAG::hit) branches by: (A) whether the item is intact (checked via Item::getFrame), (B) whether the attacker is an NPC (Item::isNpc(attacker)), and (C) hitCode == 1 for the player branch. These branches select sound effects, whether to set avatar stasis, which animations to run, and whether to call the object's U8P_STALAG::look method (METHOD::0080) as part of the reaction.

Player-break branch: setAvatarInStasis(1) -> playSFX(...) -> Kernel::resetRef(...) -> urandom(...) -> Item::receiveHit(...) -> Item::setType(...) -> loop Item::setFrame(0..~10) spawning FREE::1C19 each frame -> setAvatarInStasis(0) -> Item::destroy().
NPC-hit branch: Kernel::resetRef(...) -> playSFX(...) -> Item::setType(...) -> shorter loop Item::setFrame(0..~4) spawning FREE::1C19 each frame -> Item::destroy().
open_questions: Exact numeric constants: the sound IDs passed to playSFX, the type id used in Item::setType, and exact frame loop bounds (inferred as ~0..10 and ~0..4) are approximated from control flow and not definitively named here.
Precise semantics of METHOD::0080: it appears to invoke the object's own U8P_STALAG::look method (U8P_STALAG::STALAG::look) in one branch, but whether it does additional state work is not shown.
Whether hitCode values other than 1 correspond to critical vs glancing blows or to specific weapon types is not fully resolvable from this excerpt.
Whether the spawned FREE::1C19 process is purely visual debris or also affects gameplay (collision, damage) is inferred but not proven.

main_function.name: U8P_STALAG::look
main_function.purpose: Produce a short, player-visible description for the stalagmite/stalactite item (appends/returns the literal string "stalactite ") via Item::bark.
entry_conditions: Event 0 (U8P_STALAG::look/examine) triggered when an actor examines or looks at the item.

function_map.name: U8P_STALAG::look
function_map.role: Handle the object's U8P_STALAG::look/examine event and invoke Item::bark with the description string.

function_map.name: U8P_STALAG::hit
function_map.role: Respond to hit events against the stalag: branch on attacker type and hitCode, play SFX, animate breaking, spawn debris, apply receiveHit, and destroy or change type as appropriate.

function_map.name: Item::bark
function_map.role: Engine/item routine used to display or enqueue short text from an item to a viewer/process.

function_map.name: Item::getFrame
function_map.role: Query the item's visual frame/state to determine intact vs damaged.

function_map.name: Item::isNpc
function_map.role: Test if the attacker pid is an NPC to select NPC-specific behavior.

function_map.name: U8P_STALAG::playSFX
function_map.role: Play a sound effect associated with hitting or breaking the item.

function_map.name: Kernel::resetRef
function_map.role: Engine housekeeping before mutating/spawning processes related to the item.

function_map.name: urandom
function_map.role: Generate randomness used as a parameter to Item::receiveHit to vary effects.

function_map.name: Item::receiveHit
function_map.role: Record/apply the hit to the item (damage bookkeeping).

function_map.name: Item::setType
function_map.role: Change the item type (likely to a broken/fragment type) before animation and destruction.

function_map.name: Item::setFrame
function_map.role: Advance the item's animation frame during break sequences.

function_map.name: spawn FREE::1C19
function_map.role: Spawn a short-lived visual/debris process each animation frame.

function_map.name: Item::destroy
function_map.role: Remove the item from the world after breaking animation completes.

function_map.name: METHOD::0080
function_map.role: Invokes the object's U8P_STALAG::look method (used in one hit branch to display/refresh description).

internal_calls.purpose: In one player-hit branch, call the object's own U8P_STALAG::look method (via METHOD::0080) to display or re-show description as part of the reaction.

external_calls.purpose: Send the literal short description string ('stalactite ') to be displayed to the viewer.
Check current visual frame/state to determine if the item is intact and which reaction branch to take.
Determine whether the attacker is an NPC (select NPC vs player reaction branches).
Freeze/unfreeze the player (1 before animation, 0 after) during a player-triggered break animation.
Play branch-appropriate sound effects for breaking or being struck.
Engine housekeeping/reset references before mutating or spawning related processes.
Generate small randomness passed to Item::receiveHit to vary effect parameters.
Record or apply the hit/damage to the item in the player-hit branch.
Switch the item's type to a broken/fragments variant prior to animating and destroying it.
Advance the object's animation frames in a loop to animate breaking.
Create per-frame debris/particle effects during the break animation.
Remove the object from the world after the break animation finishes.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Provides the 'U8P_STALAG::look' (examine) response for a stalagmite/stalactite object so the player sees a short description like "stalactite ".
